verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem post hæc, percussit David Philisthiim, et humiliavit eos, et tulit David frenum tributi de manu Philisthiim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ אַֽחֲרֵי־כֵ֔ן וַיַּ֥ךְ דָּוִ֛ד אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וַיַּכְנִיעֵ֑ם וַיִּקַּ֥ח דָּוִ֛ד אֶת־מֶ֥תֶג הָאַמָּ֖ה מִיַּ֥ד פְּלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass after this that David defeated the Philistines, and brought them down, and David took the bridle of tribute out of the hand of the Philistines,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sitte tapahtui, että David löi Philistealaiset ja alensi heitä; ja David otti orjuuden suitset Philistealaisten kädestä
verses.king_james: And after this it came to pass, that David smote the Philistines, and subdued them: and David took Metheg–ammah out of the hand of the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percussit Moab, et mensus est eos funiculo, coæquans terræ : mensus est autem duos funiculos, unum ad occidendum, et unum ad vivificandum : factusque est Moab David serviens sub tributo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣ךְ אֶת־מוֹאָ֗ב וַֽיְמַדְּדֵ֤ם בַּחֶ֙בֶל֙ הַשְׁכֵּ֣ב אוֹתָ֣ם אַ֔רְצָה וַיְמַדֵּ֤ד שְׁנֵֽי־חֲבָלִים֙ לְהָמִ֔ית וּמְלֹ֥א הַחֶ֖בֶל לְהַחֲי֑וֹת וַתְּהִ֤י מוֹאָב֙ לְדָוִ֔ד לַעֲבָדִ֖ים נֹשְׂאֵ֥י מִנְחָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he defeated Moab, and measured them with a line, casting them down to the earth: and he measured with two lines, one to put to death, and one to save alive: and Moab was made to serve David under tribute.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän löi Moabilaiset, pani heidät maahan makaamaan ja mittasi heitä nuoralla: ja hän mittasi kaksi nuoraa tapettavaksi ja yhden nuoran elämään jätettäväksi, ja Moabilaiset tulivat Davidin palveliaksi, ja he kantoivat hänelle lahjoja.
verses.king_james: And he smote Moab, and measured them with a line, casting them down to the ground; even with two lines measured he to put to death, and with one full line to keep alive. And so the Moabites became David’s servants, and brought gifts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percussit David Adarezer filium Rohob regem Soba, quando profectus est ut dominaretur super flumen Euphraten.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣ךְ דָּוִ֔ד אֶת־הֲדַדְעֶ֥זֶר בֶּן־רְחֹ֖ב מֶ֣לֶךְ צוֹבָ֑ה בְּלֶכְתּ֕וֹ לְהָשִׁ֥יב יָד֖וֹ (בנהר) [בִּֽנְהַר־פְּרָֽת]׃
verses.douay_rheims: David defeated also Adarezer the son of Rohob king of Soba, when he went to extend his dominion over the river Euphrates.
verses.finnish_biblia: David löi myös HadadEserin, Rehobin pojan Zoban kuninkaan, hänen mennessä asettamaan kättänsä Euphratin virran tykö.
verses.king_james: David smote also Hadadezer, the son of Rehob, king of Zobah, as he went to recover his border at the river Euphrates.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et captis David ex parte ejus mille septingentis equitibus, et viginti millibus peditum, subnervavit omnes jugales curruum : dereliquit autem ex eis centum currus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּלְכֹּ֨ד דָּוִ֜ד מִמֶּ֗נּוּ אֶ֤לֶף וּשְׁבַע־מֵאוֹת֙ פָּרָשִׁ֔ים וְעֶשְׂרִ֥ים אֶ֖לֶף אִ֣ישׁ רַגְלִ֑י וַיְעַקֵּ֤ר דָּוִד֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הָרֶ֔כֶב וַיּוֹתֵ֥ר מִמֶּ֖נּוּ מֵ֥אָה רָֽכֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David took from him a thousand and seven hundred horsemen, and twenty thousand footmen, and houghed all the chariot horses: and only reserved of them for one hundred chariots.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David otti heistä tuhannen ja seitsemänsataa hevosmiestä ja kaksikymmentä tuhatta jalkamiestä kiinni, ja raiskasi kaikki vaunuhevoset, ja sata vaunua jätti heistä.
verses.king_james: And David took from him a thousand chariots, and seven hundred horsemen, and twenty thousand footmen: and David houghed all the chariot horses, but reserved of them for an hundred chariots.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venit quoque Syria Damasci, ut præsidium ferret Adarezer regi Soba : et percussit David de Syria viginti duo millia virorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּבֹא֙ אֲרַ֣ם דַּמֶּ֔שֶׂק לַעְזֹ֕ר לַהֲדַדְעֶ֖זֶר מֶ֣לֶךְ צוֹבָ֑ה וַיַּ֤ךְ דָּוִד֙ בַּאֲרָ֔ם עֶשְׂרִֽים־וּשְׁנַ֥יִם אֶ֖לֶף אִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Syrians of Damascus came to succour Adarezer the king of Soba: and David slew of the Syrians two and twenty thousand men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tulivat Syrialaiset Damaskusta auttamaan HadadEseriä, Zoban kuningasta; ja David löi Syrialaisista kaksikolmattakymmentä tuhatta miestä.
verses.king_james: And when the Syrians of Damascus came to succour Hadadezer king of Zobah, David slew of the Syrians two and twenty thousand men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuit David præsidium in Syria Damasci : factaque est Syria David serviens sub tributo : servavitque Dominus David in omnibus ad quæcumque profectus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨שֶׂם דָּוִ֤ד נְצִבִים֙ בַּאֲרַ֣ם דַּמֶּ֔שֶׂק וַתְּהִ֤י אֲרָם֙ לְדָוִ֔ד לַעֲבָדִ֖ים נוֹשְׂאֵ֣י מִנְחָ֑ה וַיֹּ֤שַׁע יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־דָּוִ֔ד בְּכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָלָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David put garrisons in Syria of Damascus: and Syria served David under tribute, and the Lord preserved David in all his enterprises, whithersoever he went.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David asetti vartiat Syrian Damaskuun. Näin tulivat Syrialaiset Davidin palveliaksi ja kantoivat hänelle lahjoja; sillä Herra autti Davidia, kuhunka ikänä hän meni.
verses.king_james: Then David put garrisons in Syria of Damascus: and the Syrians became servants to David, and brought gifts. And the Lord preserved David whithersoever he went.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tulit David arma aurea quæ habebant servi Adarezer, et detulit ea in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח דָּוִ֗ד אֵ֚ת שִׁלְטֵ֣י הַזָּהָ֔ב אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָי֔וּ אֶ֖ל עַבְדֵ֣י הֲדַדְעָ֑זֶר וַיְבִיאֵ֖ם יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David took the arms of gold, which the servants of Adarezer wore and brought them to Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David otti HadadEserin palveliain kultaiset kilvet ja vei ne Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: And David took the shields of gold that were on the servants of Hadadezer, and brought them to Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Bete et de Beroth, civitatibus Adarezer, tulit rex David æs multum nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבֶּ֥טַח וּמִבֵּרֹתַ֖י עָרֵ֣י הֲדַדְעָ֑זֶר לָקַ֞ח הַמֶּ֧לֶךְ דָּוִ֛ד נְחֹ֖שֶׁת הַרְבֵּ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And out of Bete, and out of Beroth, cities of Adarezer, king David took and exceeding great quantity of brass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Betasta ja Berotaista, HadadEserin kaupungeista, otti kuningas David ylen paljon vaskea.
verses.king_james: And from Betah, and from Berothai, cities of Hadadezer, king David took exceeding much brass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivit autem Thou rex Emath quod percussisset David omne robur Adarezer,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֕ע תֹּ֖עִי מֶ֣לֶךְ חֲמָ֑ת כִּ֚י הִכָּ֣ה דָוִ֔ד אֵ֖ת כׇּל־חֵ֥יל הֲדַדְעָֽזֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Thou the king of Emath heard that David had defeated all the forces of Adarezer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Toi, Hamatin kuningas kuuli Davidin lyöneen kaikki HadadEserin sotaväen,
verses.king_james: When Toi king of Hamath heard that David had smitten all the host of Hadadezer,

verses.latin_vulgate: et misit Thou Joram filium suum ad regem David, ut salutaret eum congratulans, et gratias ageret : eo quod expugnasset Adarezer, et percussisset eum. Hostis quippe erat Thou Adarezer, et in manu ejus erant vasa aurea, et vasa argentea, et vasa ærea :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח תֹּ֣עִי אֶת־יֽוֹרָם־בְּנ֣וֹ אֶל־הַמֶּֽלֶךְ־דָּ֠וִ֠ד לִשְׁאׇל־ל֨וֹ לְשָׁל֜וֹם וּֽלְבָרְכ֗וֹ עַל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר נִלְחַ֤ם בַּהֲדַדְעֶ֙זֶר֙ וַיַּכֵּ֔הוּ כִּי־אִ֛ישׁ מִלְחֲמ֥וֹת תֹּ֖עִי הָיָ֣ה הֲדַדְעָ֑זֶר וּבְיָד֗וֹ הָי֛וּ כְּלֵי־כֶ֥סֶף וּכְלֵי־זָהָ֖ב וּכְלֵ֥י נְחֹֽשֶׁת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Thou sent Joram his son to king David, to salute him, and to congratulate with him, and to return him thanks: because he had fought against Adarezer, and had defeated him. For Thou was an enemy to Adarezer, and in his hand were vessels of gold, and vessels of silver, and vessels of brass:
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähetti hän poikansa Joramin kuningas Davidin tykö, tervehtimään häntä ystävällisesti ja siunaamaan häntä, että hän soti HadadEserin kanssa ja löi hänen; sillä Toi soti HadadEserin kanssa; ja hänen kädessänsä olivat hopiaiset, kultaiset ja vaskiset astiat.
verses.king_james: Then Toi sent Joram his son unto king David, to salute him, and to bless him, because he had fought against Hadadezer, and smitten him: for Hadadezer had wars with Toi. And Joram brought with him vessels of silver, and vessels of gold, and vessels of brass:

verses.latin_vulgate: quæ et ipsa sanctificavit rex David Domino cum argento et auro quæ sanctificaverat de universis gentibus quas subegerat,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אֹתָ֕ם הִקְדִּ֛ישׁ הַמֶּ֥לֶךְ דָּוִ֖ד לַיהֹוָ֑ה עִם־הַכֶּ֤סֶף וְהַזָּהָב֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִקְדִּ֔ישׁ מִכׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֖ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר כִּבֵּֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king David dedicated them to the Lord, together with the silver and gold that he had dedicated of all the nations, which he had subdued:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne myös kuningas David pyhitti Herralle, sen hopian ja kullan kanssa, jonka hän pyhitti Herralle kaikilta pakanoilta, jotka hän vaatinut oli allensa:
verses.king_james: Which also king David did dedicate unto the Lord, with the silver and gold that he had dedicated of all nations which he subdued;

verses.latin_vulgate: de Syria, et Moab, et filiis Ammon, et Philisthiim, et Amalec, et de manubiis Adarezer filii Rohob regis Soba.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאֲרָ֤ם וּמִמּוֹאָב֙ וּמִבְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֔וֹן וּמִפְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וּמֵעֲמָלֵ֑ק וּמִשְּׁלַ֛ל הֲדַדְעֶ֥זֶר בֶּן־רְחֹ֖ב מֶ֥לֶךְ צוֹבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Syria, and of Moab, and of the children Ammon, and of the Philistines, and of Amalec, and of the spoils of Adarezer the son of Rohob king of Soba.
verses.finnish_biblia: Syriasta ja Moabista, Ammonin lapsilta, Philistealaisilta, Amalekilaisilta, niin myös HadadEserin, Rehobin pojan, Zoban kuninkaan saaliista.
verses.king_james: Of Syria, and of Moab, and of the children of Ammon, and of the Philistines, and of Amalek, and of the spoil of Hadadezer, son of Rehob, king of Zobah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque sibi David nomen cum reverteretur capta Syria in valle Salinarum, cæsis decem et octo millibus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ דָּוִד֙ שֵׁ֔ם בְּשֻׁב֕וֹ מֵהַכּוֹת֥וֹ אֶת־אֲרָ֖ם בְּגֵיא־מֶ֑לַח שְׁמוֹנָ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר אָֽלֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: David also made himself a name, when he returned after taking Syria in the valley of the saltpits, killing eighteen thousand:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David teki itsensä kuuluisaksi, kuin hän palasi lyömästä Syrialaisia Suolalaaksossa, kahdeksantoistakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: And David gat him a name when he returned from smiting of the Syrians in the valley of salt, being eighteen thousand men.

verses.latin_vulgate: et posuit in Idumæa custodes, statuitque præsidium : et facta est universa Idumæa serviens David, et servavit Dominus David in omnibus ad quæcumque profectus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨שֶׂם בֶּאֱד֜וֹם נְצִבִ֗ים בְּכׇל־אֱדוֹם֙ שָׂ֣ם נְצִבִ֔ים וַיְהִ֥י כׇל־אֱד֖וֹם עֲבָדִ֣ים לְדָוִ֑ד וַיּ֤וֹשַׁע יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־דָּוִ֔ד בְּכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָלָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he put guards in Edom, and placed there a garrison: and all Edom was made to serve David: and the Lord preserved David in all enterprises he went about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän asetti vartiat koko Edomiin, ja koko Edom oli Davidin alla; sillä Herra autti Davidia, kuhunka ikänä hän meni.
verses.king_james: And he put garrisons in Edom; throughout all Edom put he garrisons, and all they of Edom became David’s servants. And the Lord preserved David whithersoever he went.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et regnavit David super omnem Israël : faciebat quoque David judicium et justitiam omni populo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמְלֹ֥ךְ דָּוִ֖ד עַל־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיְהִ֣י דָוִ֗ד עֹשֶׂ֛ה מִשְׁפָּ֥ט וּצְדָקָ֖ה לְכׇל־עַמּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David reigned over all Israel: and David did judgment and justice to all his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin oli David kaiken Israelin kuningas, ja hän toimitti lain ja oikeuden kaikelle kansallensa.
verses.king_james: And David reigned over all Israel; and David executed judgment and justice unto all his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Joab autem filius Sarviæ erat super exercitum : porro Josaphat filius Ahilud erat a commentariis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹאָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֖ה עַל־הַצָּבָ֑א וִיהוֹשָׁפָ֥ט בֶּן־אֲחִיל֖וּד מַזְכִּֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joab the son Sarvia was over the army: and Josaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joab, ZeruJan poika oli sotajoukon päällä, mutta Josaphat, Ahiludin poika oli kansleri.
verses.king_james: And Joab the son of Zeruiah was over the host; and Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder;

verses.latin_vulgate: et Sadoc filius Achitob, et Achimelech filius Abiathar, erant sacerdotes : et Saraias, scriba :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצָד֧וֹק בֶּן־אֲחִיט֛וּב וַאֲחִימֶ֥לֶךְ בֶּן־אֶבְיָתָ֖ר כֹּהֲנִ֑ים וּשְׂרָיָ֖ה סוֹפֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sadoc the son of Achitob, and Achimelech the son of Abiathar, were the priests: and Saraias was the scribe:
verses.finnish_biblia: Zadok, Ahitobin poika ja Ahimelek, AbJatarin poika olivat papit; Seraja oli kirjoittaja.
verses.king_james: And Zadok the son of Ahitub, and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, were the priests; and Seraiah was the scribe;

verses.latin_vulgate: Banaias autem filius Jojadæ super Cerethi et Phelethi : filii autem David sacerdotes erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנָיָ֙הוּ֙ בֶּן־יְה֣וֹיָדָ֔ע וְהַכְּרֵתִ֖י וְהַפְּלֵתִ֑י וּבְנֵ֥י דָוִ֖ד כֹּהֲנִ֥ים הָיֽוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Banaias the son of Joiada was over the Cerethi and Phelethi: and the sons of David were the princes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Benaja, Jojadan poika oli Kretin ja Pletin päällä; ja Davidin pojat olivat papit.
verses.king_james: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over both the Cherethites and the Pelethites; and David’s sons were chief rulers.
